sentences.english: Do you think homework is necessary for students?
Give reasons to support your opinion.
I believe homework is necessary but only when it's meaningful and not excessive.
sentences.korean: 숙제가 필요하다고 생각하지만 의미 있고 과도하지 않을 때만 그래요.

sentences.english: First homework reinforces what students learn in class.
sentences.korean: 첫째 숙제는 수업에서 배운 것을 강화시켜줘요.

sentences.english: Without practice most information is forgotten within days.
sentences.korean: 연습 없이는 대부분의 정보가 며칠 안에 잊혀져요.

sentences.english: Second it teaches students self-discipline and time management skills that are essential for adult life.
sentences.korean: 둘째 성인 생활에 필수적인 자기 통제력과 시간 관리 능력을 가르쳐줘요.

sentences.english: However I think teachers should focus on quality over quantity — one thoughtful assignment is worth more than ten pages of busywork.
sentences.korean: 하지만 교사는 양보다 질에 집중해야 해요 — 사려 깊은 과제 하나가 10페이지 단순 반복보다 가치 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Best Way to Learn a Language
